_principle: Declarative display-state intermediate flows. Each entry intercepts the LLM when a customer-reported display token (after location/type/number capture) matches one of the documented incident codes. Phase A emits a one-shot guidance reply (replyKey from localization.ts) and marks state.activeFlowId. Phase B reads the next customer turn: resolvedRegex closes the case, persistFailureRegex (or alwaysEscalateOnNextTurn) escalates with escalationReason. Anti-hardcode rule: never add a TypeScript guard for a 'display X → guide → escalate' pattern; add a JSON entry here. Schema/validation lives in models/display-flow.ts and is enforced at boot in utils/runtime.ts.

flows.escalationReason: Caso 5 — AL001 sequence guidance did not resolve
Caso 14 — ALM DOOR persists after retry
